_comment: Schema for /workspace/qwen_voices/manifest.json on the pod. The real manifest is local-only (it embeds your reference transcripts, which are usually proprietary marketing copy). Each entry maps a voice ID like 'fr_grand_public' to the reference audio path on the pod (≤25 s mono MP3) plus the matching transcript and Qwen language token. qwen_clone_proxy.py reads this file at startup. To add a voice: drop the audio at /workspace/qwen_voices/<id>.mp3, append an entry here, restart the proxy.

fr_grand_public.ref_text: <full transcript of fr_grand_public.mp3 — same text the speaker actually says, ideally exactly>
